title: Breaking into Impel Down: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Why are you pissing him off!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Fuhaha- Hahaha!! Fooled ya, you simple beast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Hey, what's going on!? The ground's shaking...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's something really loud above us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's the gate to the staircase!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll make the key out of wax!
